title: Economic Policy Reports
summary: This is a Treasury Department navigation page listing historical economic policy reports spanning 2009-2023, covering topics including labor markets, childcare, infrastructure investment, mortgage assistance, and public-private partnerships. No specific macro catalyst or market-moving content is present; the page serves only as an index of prior publications.
key_points: The page lists Treasury economic reports dating from 2009 to October 2023
Topics include labor unions, childcare supply, non-compete contracts, infrastructure public-private partnerships, and HAMP principal reduction
No FOMC statements, rate decisions, or monetary policy communications are included
No current market data, inflation figures, or employment statistics are present
The page is a navigation/index page, not an archival record itself
The most recent publication listed is from October 2023 (Equitable Recovery Report)
why_it_matters: This source provides no actionable market intelligence or current macro catalyst information. It is a static index of past Treasury publications and is not suitable for RAG retrieval on market-moving events or current macro conditions.
notes: Non-archivable navigation page. The content is a table of contents for Treasury economic publications with no specific analysis, data, or policy signals. Per Rule 6, listing pages should be flagged. The TARGET macro catalysts is not served by this source.
